segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom. Good morning, everyone. Next Wednesday, I'll be attena day, so our class Wednesday will be canceled. However, I will be creating an online lesson for you to complete that day in itbe, available starting Monday. So you may want to get a head start on it. And remember, you can always email me with any questions.
